title: Cloud Mental Models
shortSummary: The essential models a non-technical person needs before comparing vendors or making platform decisions.
whyItMatters: Most cloud confusion comes from skipping the mental model layer. Once you understand service levels, abstraction, and ownership boundaries, provider differences become much easier to interpret.
coreConcepts: IaaS, PaaS, SaaS, and data platforms
Public cloud, private cloud, and hybrid patterns
Abstraction layers and who carries the operational burden
